body.purpose: All UI copy, labels, headers, and body text.

mono.purpose: All numeric values: amounts, percentages, dates, ordinals.

label.purpose: Section headers, button labels, form labels.

shadows.name: modal-umbra
shadows.purpose: Modal card shadow. The only shadow in the system.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Hover and focus transitions on interactive elements.

motion.name: duration-instant
motion.purpose: Background color transitions on item hover.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Border and color transitions on buttons and inputs.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button. Amber fill, dark text, uppercase label.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #c8a44e; color: #141414; border: 1px solid #c8a44e; padding: 10px 20px; min-height: 42px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94), opacity 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #a68a3a; border-color: #a68a3a; } .ds-btn-primary:active { opacity: 0.8; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary/cancel action. Surface background, border stroke.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #1e1e1e; color: #8a8780; border: 1px solid #2e2e2e; padding: 10px 20px; min-height: 42px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #383838; color: #d4d0c8; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { background: #252525; }

components.name: List Item
components.html:
Groceries$120.00
15th • $200.00 • Spend (-$80.00)
components.css: .ds-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 4px; background: #1e1e1e; margin-bottom: 6px; border: 1px solid transparent; transition: border-color 0.1s; } .ds-item:hover { border-color: #2e2e2e; } .ds-item-info { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; } .ds-item-name { font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; color: #d4d0c8; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-item-amount { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', monospace; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.03em; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-positive { color: #7bc48e; } .ds-item-meta { width: 100%; } .ds-meta { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: #5c5a55; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-item-progress { width: 100%; height: 2px; background: #2e2e2e; border-radius: 1px; overflow: hidden; margin-top: 4px; } .ds-item-progress-bar { height: 100%; border-radius: 1px; transition: width 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-warning { background: #b89940; }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid #2e2e2e; background: #1e1e1e; color: #d4d0c8; font-size: 15px; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; min-height: 42px; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #a68a3a; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(200, 164, 78, 0.08); }

components.name: Section Card
components.description: Column section card containing a category (Budget, Bills, etc.).
components.css: .ds-section { background: #1a1a1a; padding: 14px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #2e2e2e; } .ds-section-title { margin: 0 0 14px 0; display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #5c5a55; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #2e2e2e; } .ds-section-total { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #8a8780; margin-left: auto; margin-right: 10px; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-section-add { background: transparent; border: 1px solid #383838; color: #5c5a55; width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 15px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; } .ds-section-add:hover { color: #c8a44e; border-color: #a68a3a; } .ds-item-placeholder { text-align: center; color: #5c5a55; font-size: 14px; padding: 16px; opacity: 0.4; }

components.name: Footer Bar
components.description: Fixed bottom bar with available amount and action buttons.
components.html: Available$2,450.00
components.css: .ds-footer { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 10px 16px; background: #1a1a1a; border-top: 1px solid #2e2e2e; max-width: 400px; } .ds-footer-left { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-available-label { font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #5c5a55; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; font-weight: 600; } .ds-available-amount { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 24px; color: #c8a44e; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.03em; } .ds-footer-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .ds-footer-btn { border: 1px solid #2e2e2e; background: transparent; color: #8a8780; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px; min-width: 42px; min-height: 42px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; } .ds-footer-btn:hover { border-color: #383838; color: #d4d0c8; } .ds-footer-btn:active { background: #252525; }

components.name: Modal Dialog
components.html: Edit Budget
components.css: .ds-modal { background: #1a1a1a; padding: 20px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #2e2e2e; width: 100%; max-width: 460px; box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); color: #d4d0c8; } .ds-modal-title { margin: 0 0 18px 0; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #d4d0c8; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid #2e2e2e; background: #1e1e1e; color: #d4d0c8; font-size: 15px; font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; min-height: 42px; transition: border-color 0.15s; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #a68a3a; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(200, 164, 78, 0.08); }

narrative.overview:
An operational dashboard for personal finance. Warm blacks and amber data recall industrial control panels — glowing dial indicators on dark backgrounds, purposeful illumination where attention is needed. Every surface recedes so the numbers lead.

The system is flat by default: depth comes from tonal layering (background → card → surface → surface-up), not shadows. Cards and containers are distinguished by subtle borders and background shifts. The one shadow in the system belongs to modals, pulling the user's focus to an overlay action.
keyCharacteristics: Dark warm palette with amber primary: utility-brewed, not corporate-cool
Typography hierarchy is the layout: one typeface (DM Sans) for structure, one (JetBrains Mono) for data
Interactive elements are tactile and confident: amber glow on hover, visible press states, clear feedback
The available amount is the anchor element — the answer to 'what can I spend?'
No charts, no gauges, no data viz flourishes

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Amber is the only accent. Green, red, yellow, and blue are semantic (positive / negative / warning / action) — never decorative. If a color can't be described as 'signaling X', it doesn't belong.

rules.name: The Surface Stack Rule
rules.body: Four neutral steps define depth: bg (farthest) → card → surface → surface-up (closest). No shadows needed. This stack is the elevation system.

rules.name: The Mono-for-Data Rule
rules.body: All numeric values render in JetBrains Mono. Not just financial figures — percentages, dates in display, ordinal days. If it's a number, it's mono.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The surface stack handles depth. The shadow on modals is the exception that proves the rule — use it sparingly enough that it still feels like an exception.

dos: Use tonal layering for depth. Four steps (bg → card → surface → surface-up) are enough.
Make interactive elements visible on hover — amber border glow or surface-up background, clearly scoped.
Set all monetary values in JetBrains Mono with consistent -0.03em tracking.
Use progress bars as the only data indicator. One bar per item, 2px tall.
Keep the available amount in the footer at 24px amber — it's the primary answer the user came for.
Use animateNumberChange with color flash (green for up, red for down) as the single animated feedback.
Use ease-out-quart / cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) for motion. No bounce, no elastic.
donts: Don't use SaaS-cream fintech aesthetics. No rounded cards with gradients, no hero-metric templates, no onboarding wizards.
Don't use dashboard treatments: no gauges, sparklines, charts, data viz flourishes, or 'insights' panels.
Don't use Notion-style design: no dot-grid backgrounds, pastel accents, or playful illustration.
Don't use #000 or #fff. Every neutral is tinted warm.
Don't use em dashes ever. Commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses only.
Don't add side-stripe borders. No border-left >1px colored accent on cards, items, or callouts.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient). One solid color per text element.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default. No decorative backdrop-blur.
Don't animate CSS layout properties (width, height, position, margin, padding, gap, grid).
Don't wrap everything in a container. Most things don't need one.
Don't nest cards. One container layer per surface.
